privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated construction WBS data (18 activities). By calculating the PERT/CPM schedule using Forward and Backward passes on the dependencies and durations provided in setup_task.sh, the project duration is exactly 61 days. Activities H, I, J, and K are non-critical (slack > 0), while the remaining 14 activities (A, B, C, D, E, F, G, L, M, N, O, P, Q, R) lie on the critical path (0 slack).
